headline: CBS News Senior White House Reporter Jennifer Jacobs Posts On X "Scoop: Trump scheduled to meet with top executives from the largest U.S. defense contractors on Wednesday, sources tell me. Admin has been ratcheting up pressure on defense contractors re: shareholder payouts. But Northrop Grumman increased their shareholder dividends by about 7% in May."

raw.headline: CBS News Senior White House Reporter Jennifer Jacobs Posts On X "Scoop: Trump scheduled to meet with top executives from the largest U.S. defense contractors on Wednesday, sources tell me. Admin has been ratcheting up pressure on defense contractors re: shareholder payouts. But Northrop Grumman increased their shareholder dividends by about 7% in May."

headline: 2 S&P 500 Stocks to Research Further and 1 We Turn Down
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.
